response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly capable Staff/Senior Software Engineer with strong distributed systems expertise, he lacks the executive leadership experience required for a venture-backed CTO role. The job mandates 5+ years of senior technical leadership, a track record of scaling teams from 10 to 30+ engineers, and deep architectural ownership of production multi-agent AI systems in high-stakes fintech environments, none of which are demonstrated in his resume.
strengths: Extensive backend engineering experience, including designing microservices capable of handling millions of requests per second.
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) development.
Domain familiarity with fintech and pricing engines from roles at RIDE Capital and Optilyz.
concerns: Complete lack of executive engineering leadership experience; no evidence of scaling or managing organizations of 10-30+ engineers.
Missing production experience architecting complex, stateful multi-agent AI systems for automated financial decisioning.
No demonstrated experience managing hybrid engineering models, outsourced teams, or enterprise-level compliance governance.
